# MEOK GTM Play — The Operator View | MEOK AI Labs

> MEOK GTM Play. One operator view of the funnel. 95 emails staged, 25 prospects qualified, 73% avg closing. The 6 actions. The 5 outreach messages. The 48-day cliff. CSOAI Ltd, UK 16939677.
